arifos-Kernel.description: Unified arifOS Kernel MCP — Single server with 13 canonical tools (arif_noun_verb). WELL, WEALTH, GEOX registered as internal organ domains.

_comment: CONSOLIDATED v2026-05-24: 7 broken MCP servers merged into 1 unified arifOS Kernel. WELL/WEALTH/GEOX are organ domains within the single kernel, not separate servers. DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI.
